about.title: A private classified for the deals you won't find anywhere else.
about.lead: We surface what developers and brokers don't advertise: owner-released contracts, distressed resales, and scarce units in sold-out buildings — reviewed by analysts and shared with credentialed buyers.

supportItems.title: Expert analytics
supportItems.desc: Detailed analysis for every property: competitive pricing, market benchmarks, rental yield — backed by real data.

supportItems.title: Viewing organization
supportItems.desc: We book and conduct viewings, coordinate with owners, and answer all client questions.

supportItems.title: Local presence
supportItems.desc: Our team is on the ground in Phuket, Samui, and Pattaya — real local expertise.

supportItems.title: Concierge service
supportItems.desc: Airport pickup, hotel booking, property tours — the client just needs to choose.

supportItems.title: Turnkey deals
supportItems.desc: Full support through closing: lawyers, paperwork, payments, registration — all under control.

about.contactSub: Two-minute form. We respond within four hours.

footer.tagline: A private classified for distressed and assignment properties across Phuket. Reviewed by analysts, circulated to credentialed clients.
